lever: replace naive 60-term Taylor (full O(n^3) i-j-l matmul per term, numerically unstable for large norm) with scaling-and-squaring (scale A by 2^-s so ||A 2^-s||_inf <= 1/2, short Taylor core, square s times) over a cache-friendly i-k-j GEMM

n300_d40.note: old naive Taylor is INACCURATE at high norm (overflow/cancellation before factorial dominates); new scaling-squaring is the correct value
